title: Toxocarpus tomentosus
taxonomy: Toxocarpus tomentosus is classified within the plant family Apocynaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The genus Toxocarpus is part of the subfamily Rauvolfioideae, a subfamily that includes many species native to tropical Asia. As a member of the Apocynaceae family, Toxocarpus tomentosus is closely related to other plants like Rauvolfia and Tabernaemontana. The specific classification of Toxocarpus tomentosus is further supported by molecular phylogenetic studies, which confirm its position within the Apocynaceae family. The precise classification of Toxocarpus tomentosus is as follows: Toxocarpus tomentosus belongs to the kingdom Plantae, class Magnoliopsida, order Gentianales, family Apocynaceae, and genus Toxocarpus.
